notes: Game works for me native on Linux but only with graphical glitches. On Proton it works out of the box. I installed manually D9VK and it worked as well fine with this DX9 to Vulkan translation, except that some text are not rendered.
title: Trine 3: The Artifacts of Power

notes: Game works for me native on Linux but only with graphical glitches. On Proton it works out of the box. I installed manually D9VK and it worked as well fine with this DX9 to Vulkan translation even with the new ACO compiler.
title: Trine 3: The Artifacts of Power
